text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One night, as I'm walking along the river...

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
We're gonna have a one-off, all-or-nothin'. No
whinin' if you lose, all right?

text_block_list.name: Figure in Black A
text_block_list.text: Tch, watch how you speak to Her Holiness!

text_block_list.name: Angel of the Night
text_block_list.text:
Hush, now. It seems that we have a guest... Not
just some stray, I'm sure.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What do I find but a standoff between an
Umamusume in a Tracen Academy uniform and a
lady with an entourage of figures in black!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: That badge... Heh. You're from the academy.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Everyone just relax. That goes for you too,
Trainer. We're just gonna have a friendly game.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
It's just a regular bout of Concentration, me
versus her.

text_block_list.name: Figure in Black B
text_block_list.text:
Do you have any idea how lucky you are? Even
VIPs need to wait their turn for an audience with
Her Holi—

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Uh-oh... Is that something you can just freely
disclose to a random passerby?

text_block_list.name: Angel of the Night
text_block_list.text:
Ah yes, you're right... Come now, everyone. Let's
not trouble this law-abiding citizen. This is a
match between the two of us.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Well, there ya have it, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Turn around and get going, before ya find
yourself in too deep.
choice_data_list: What do you mean by "in too deep"?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
I mean, take a good look around you. Ya don't
belong here.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
If ya get what I'm sayin', scurry on home. You
wouldn't wanna go and spoil that nice career of
yours, would ya?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The line of black-clad figures continues to glare
at me. If looks could kill... It seems like they might
actually be denizens of society's underbelly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, a Tracen Academy student is right here
in front of me. I have no doubt she runs to realize
her dreams. As a trainer, there's only one thing I
can do...
choice_data_list:
There's no way I can look the other way! Let me
handle this!

There's no way I can look the other way! Let me
handle this!
Let's get out of here as fast as we can!
Let's get out of here as fast as we can!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, a Tracen Academy student is right here
in front of me. I have no doubt she runs to realize
her dreams. As a trainer, there's only one thing I
can do...
choice_data_list:
There's no way I can look the other way! Let me
handle this!

There's no way I can look the other way! Let me
handle this!
Let's get out of here as fast as we can!
Let's get out of here as fast as we can!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: ...Um, were ya listening to a single word I said?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Drop the act. Ya don't have what it takes to help
anyone.
choice_data_list:
It's a trainer's job to be there for any
Umamusume!

It's a trainer's job to be there for any
Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
You're no more than a fool if you'd go to such
lengths for someone you just met.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
...You're just intent on putting a damper on
things, huh?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: ...I'm outta here. It seems today's not the day.

text_block_list.name: Figure in Black C
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! What the hell? You said this was the only
day you had time!

text_block_list.name: Angel of the Night
text_block_list.text:
...I don't mind. There's no point if you're not in
the mood for it. After all, I want to face you at
your best.

text_block_list.name: Figure in Black B
text_block_list.text: ...If that's how you feel...

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
My game was interrupted and I've got practically
nothing to show for it. What a waste of a night.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Still, it's been some time since I saw a scene like that... Heh. See ya around, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: H-hey! Leggo of me! Dammit!

text_block_list.name: Figures in Black
text_block_list.text: Where'd they go?! Leave no stone unturned!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Tch! The hell'd ya do that for?! Things were just
about to get interesting! I was right on the edge!
choice_data_list: We're even more on the edge right now.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? Whaddya mean?
choice_data_list:
I mean, we're in deep trouble if we get caught,
right?

I mean, we're in deep trouble if we get caught,
right?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Heheh. Hahaha! Looks like we really are cut from
the same cloth.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: (Whoa!)

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Thrilling stuff. We either make a clean getaway or
we get caught. A nice and simple gamble with
everything on the line.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Now, hold on tight!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
...And we've crossed the finish line. I've pulled off
a daring escape, joined by an addlebrained
trainer... Haha.
